channel.title: INartsAndEnt
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INartsAndEnt, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: James Van Der Beek Faced Massive Tax Debt Years Before His Death
item.description: "Dawson’s Creek" actor James Van Der Beek was dealing with a massive six-figure tax debt years before his death ... TMZ has learned. The actor and his...

item.title: Kandi Burruss Talks First Valentine's Day Post Todd Tucker Divorce

item.title: California Congressman Eric Swalwell's Secret Erotic Poetry Uncovered
item.description: Congressman Eric Swalwell was evidently a big fan of erotica in college ... and now we're getting a glimpse of some of what he wrote! The Daily Mail u...

item.title: Trump Brutally Mocked on Presidents Day With Satirical Floats at German Festival
item.description: Donald Trump might’ve been celebrating Presidents Day stateside ... but over in Germany, they were dragging him through the streets -- literally. Düss...

item.title: Valentine's Hangover -- Guess The Sexy Star In Lacy Lingerie
item.description: Cure your Valentine's hangover with this sweet treat: a sexy celeb in red-hot lingerie ... Can you guess who she is?! She's a TikTok queen from France...

item.title: An Upcoming Sequel To A 20-Year-Old Film May Be A Major 2026 Box Office Competitor
